_comment: Field classification for zq-amazon-upc-autofill. Matched (substring, case-insensitive) against a field's BASE attribute name — the part before the first '[' or '#'. First matching class wins in the order: compliance, seller_owned, else product_attribute. Edit freely to add category-specific fields.

compliance._meaning: Safety / legal / regulatory. NEVER inferred. No firm source => status must be needs_user_input, cell left blank.

seller_owned._meaning: Decided by the seller, not derivable from the web. Filled only from user-supplied intake; if absent, left blank and the file is 'attributes-only, not upload-ready'.
